generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how our neighbors in Germany are struggling with their own defense spending. They're cutting back on critical infrastructure to meet NATO targets, and it's hurting their economy. We can't afford to make the same mistake. Supporting strategic autonomy means protecting our economy while keeping us safe. #NationalSecurity #EconomicStrength
